description: Taiwanese triad society founded in May 1954 by mainland Chinese refugees who fled with the KMT. Active in alien smuggling in Southern California, with estimated membership of 10,000 in Taiwan and branches in Los Angeles and Santa Ana. Uses grey as its color.

country_links.evidence_quote: Its members have extended their influence to cities in the southern region of California . Its American constituents are a branch off of the original Taiwan society. Four Seas Gang is active in alien smuggling in Southern California.
country_links.context: The Four Seas Gang has a branch in the United States and is active in alien smuggling in Southern California.
